kaelthas.SCORECARD_FINDING: 71st percentile, a strong kill; HPM (4.85, 0.83x the sample average) was close to sample-normal, and overheal (43.3%) sat comfortably under the sample's worst parse (52.3%). Eight deaths this kill, two of them Lasmur's own, 15 seconds apart.
kaelthas.SPELL_COMPOSITION_FINDING: Circle of Healing (33.7%) undershot the sample's 44.6% share; Renew (23.4%) and Flash Heal (25.0%) both ran ahead of the sample to help make up the difference.
kaelthas.COOLDOWN_FINDING: Blessing of Life was cast twice, both self-targeted - a real, if rare-in-sample, pattern (8% Top 100 usage on this boss). Fear Ward was cast once, on Captinhelp, in line with an 87% sample usage rate. All eight deaths this kill trail the single Chakra cast by 13 seconds to just over 2.5 minutes, but Chakra is a self-targeted cooldown rather than a save for another player, so none of these - including Lasmur's own two deaths - read as a real missed-save opportunity.
kaelthas.TARGET_FINDING: Target coverage (56.7%) ran above the sample average (42.5%); top-target concentration (22.4%, Captinhelp) landed in line with the sample.

RaidOverview.GEAR_FINDING_NOTE: All 9 enchantable slots carry a permanent enchant, and this kill had a complete consumable setup.
RaidOverview.RAID_SUMMARY_FINDING: A single-boss session against Kael'thas Sunstrider, landing at the 71st percentile - the strongest relative kill Lasmur has posted this session. Eight real deaths occurred, two of them Lasmur's own (15 seconds apart); none line up with a real missed-save opportunity, since the only cooldown near any of them (Chakra) is self-targeted rather than a defensive tool for other players. Blessing of Life was cast twice, both self-targeted, continuing the same pattern seen on other kills - a real, consistent behavior against a Top 100 sample that rarely uses it. Gear and consumables were both fully clean this kill.
RaidOverview.RAID_WARNING_BANNER: Lasmur died twice during this kill, 15 seconds apart, among eight total deaths - though nothing in the nearby cooldown timing points to a real missed save, since the only cooldown cast near any of the deaths (Chakra) is self-targeted.
